author: doll-agent
content: Added tests/api_proof.rs with 9 integration tests exercising every public API in ferrolearn-bayes: per-estimator builder/fit/predict/predict_proba/predict_log_proba/predict_joint_log_proba/score/partial_fit/HasClasses, plus conjugate.posterior_normal_normal, plus f32 smoke, plus Default impls, plus ShapeMismatch surface. All 9 pass. Total ferrolearn-bayes test count: 117.
